GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is used when a customer asks for information about nearby dealership locations.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the customer asks for nearby dealerships, provide the requested information based on their location or specified area.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only provide information about nearby dealership locations based on the customer's location or specified area. You cannot assist with test drive bookings or vehicle inquiries.
